items.caption: A humorous image of a bomb disposal expert in full gear with a dog, sitting on a road with a propane tank labeled "EXPLOSIVE DETECTION" and a caption that reads "When it's obvious, call this guy." The dog appears to be a trained EOD (Explosive Ordnance Disposal) dog, and the propane tank is humorously labeled as an "explosive detection device." The setting is a rural road with vegetation on either side.
